name: IRIS DocBook -> Markdown
description: Convert InterSystems IRIS DocBook documentation to clean Markdown with preview, safe link navigation, and offline processing.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; connect-src 'none'; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; frame-ancestors 'none'
